name: Mouse
content: Today brings a surge of energy and mental clarity. It's a great day for planning and strategizing, especially concerning long-term goals. Don't be afraid to take the lead in group discussions. Your quick wit will be appreciated.
advice: Trust your instincts when making decisions, but also consider others' perspectives.

name: Cow
content: A day for steady progress and laying solid foundations. Your hard work will not go unnoticed, even if immediate rewards aren't visible. Focus on tasks that require patience and attention to detail. Family matters may require your calm presence.
advice: Stay persistent with your efforts, but remember to take breaks.

name: Tiger
content: Today is ripe for bold moves and seizing opportunities. Your natural charisma is heightened, making it a good time for networking or presenting new ideas. Don't shy away from challenges; your courage will be rewarded.
advice: Act decisively, but ensure your passion doesn't override practicality.

name: Rabbit
content: A day for peace and harmony. You'll find comfort in familiar surroundings and routines. Creative pursuits are favored, and you might discover new ways to express yourself. Nurture your relationships; a kind word goes a long way.
advice: Prioritize self-care and seek balance in all areas of your life.

name: Dragon
content: Expect an invigorating day where your leadership skills shine. Opportunities for growth and recognition may appear unexpectedly. Embrace innovation and don't be afraid to think outside the box. Your confidence is your greatest asset.
advice: Channel your ambition wisely and inspire those around you.

name: Snake
content: Your intuition is particularly sharp today. Trust your gut feelings, especially in financial or personal matters. It's a good time for introspection and making well-thought-out plans. Avoid impulsive decisions and observe before acting.
advice: Listen more than you speak; true wisdom comes from observation.

name: Horse
content: An active and dynamic day awaits. You'll feel a strong urge to explore new ideas or even new places. Social interactions are highly favorable, potentially leading to exciting connections. Embrace spontaneity, but keep your goals in sight.
advice: Channel your boundless energy into productive activities.

name: Sheep
content: Today emphasizes comfort, creativity, and compassion. You might find joy in helping others or engaging in artistic pursuits. Harmonious relationships are key; resolve any minor conflicts with gentleness and understanding.
advice: Seek beauty in your surroundings and offer kindness freely.

name: Monkey
content: A day full of intellectual stimulation and problem-solving. Your cleverness is at its peak, making it excellent for tackling complex tasks or learning something new. Be open to unexpected changes; they might lead to valuable opportunities.
advice: Use your wit to navigate challenges, but avoid overthinking.

name: Rooster
content: This is a day to shine and showcase your talents. Your organizational skills are particularly strong, helping you bring order to chaos. Don't hesitate to speak your mind, but do so with diplomacy. Pay attention to details.
advice: Present your best self, but remain humble in your achievements.

name: Dog
content: Loyalty and integrity are your guiding stars today. You might find yourself supporting friends or family members, and your reliability will be deeply appreciated. It's a good day for community involvement or strengthening personal bonds.
advice: Stand by your principles and offer genuine support to others.

name: Pig
content: A day for enjoying life's simple pleasures and fostering generosity. You may receive good news related to finances or personal relationships. Indulge in activities that bring you joy and share your good fortune with loved ones.
advice: Practice gratitude and embrace moments of joy and comfort.
